title: Love on a Pillow
writer: Roger Vadim, Christiane Rochefort, Claude Choublier
actors: Brigitte Bardot, Robert Hossein, Jean-Marc Bory
plot: A young girl rescues a man from a suicide attempt. He turns out to be a sociopath, who begins to take over her life, abusing her both verbally and emotionally, yet she can't seem to tear herself away from him.
